main.description: PDS-side stub for a Blacksky community post. The post's text, facets, langs, and reply chain are stored on the Blacksky appview and hydrated for members only. The optional `embed` field is mirrored onto the PDS stub so that the PDS's standard blob-retention pipeline (enumBlobRefs + record_blob bookkeeping) keeps any referenced blobs (image / video / external thumb / gallery / record-with-media) alive for the life of the record.

createdAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this post was originally created.

cid.description: CID of the full post content stored on the appview, for integrity verification against the appview's canonical record.
